main_modules.responsibility: Expose versioned endpoints for auth, users, products, orders and chat.
Coordinate business logic, authentication, product lookup, order creation and AI chat orchestration.
Persist and query users, products, orders and order items through SQLAlchemy sessions.
Define SQLAlchemy tables for users, products, orders and order_items.
Validate request, domain and LLM payload shapes with Pydantic.
Hash passwords, issue JWTs and resolve authenticated users.
Dispatch chat intents across idle, building_order, review_order and checkout states.
Build prompt with current state and menu, call Gemini, parse JSON intent output.

database: app/db.py creates engine/session/Base from environment variables
